parameters.subject: All Quotes Received — PR {{ $json.pr_id }} Ready for Evaluation
parameters.message:
Dear Category Manager,

All supplier responses for PR {{ $json.pr_id }} have been received.

The procurement agent has extracted key data from all {{ $json.responses_received }} responses and generated an evaluation matrix for your review.

Please access the evaluation matrix and make your award decision:

View Evaluation Matrix

Best regards,
Procurement Agent

nodes.name: SMTP: Notify CM — All Quotes Ready

parameters.subject: Response Received — PR {{ $json.pr_id }}
parameters.message:
Dear Supplier,

Thank you — we have received your response for PR {{ $json.pr_id }}.

We are still awaiting responses from other suppliers ({{ $json.responses_received }} of {{ $json.responses_expected }} received). We will be in touch once the evaluation is complete.

Best regards,
Procurement Team

main.node: SMTP: Notify CM — All Quotes Ready

meta.description: Receives supplier quote or proposal submissions via webhook, parses and normalises the response fields, forwards to LangGraph for extraction and evaluation matrix update. If all suppliers have responded, notifies the Category Manager that the evaluation is ready. Otherwise sends an acknowledgement to the submitting supplier.
